notes.body: 55% to Stay Alive — EXECUTION MODE. Week-to-date we are at 47.88% combined (COGS 26.2% + Labor 21.68%), under the goal by 7.1 points. Hold it through the weekend. Day-by-day labor: Mon 26.33%, Tue 23.55%, Wed 17.27%, Thu 21.48% — build the weekend off Wednesday, not off Monday.

Incident Process PDRs — STILL OPEN. Complete PDRs for the ENTIRE Shift Lead team on the incident-report process (first-aid kit location, when to fill, where to send), following the L2 (guest's daughter burned). Bobby replied 7/22 9:27 PM; finish the PDRs and copy Brad on documentation.

Another scam call hit Muncie the night of 7/23 — caller posed as corporate asking for the GM's name and a shipping address. No one gives login/account info, cash, or addresses over the phone. Post the email at the register; call GM/DM/Brad on any such request.

Today's Weekly G.M./A.G.M. call at 2:00 PM ET is CANCELED. Ice machine picture due today. Csp plan of action runs every morning starting Sat 7/25. Manager schedule 2nd week Mon 7/27 4 PM. Projections due Tue 7/28 by 4 PM. Certifications with Eric Maxwell Tue 7/28 9 AM ET.

7/17 deposit still not entered in CrunchTime — book cash $433.90 showing over/short (open since 7/18). CrunchTime task VO-Inv-Performance Fdsvce due TODAY; L-Rev (07/23) a day late. Delivery still OFF indefinitely (ticket 706314) — confirm OFF on fiveguys.com and file the hub ticket on the intermittent internet. Temps 7/23: all complete, clean day.
